af_score_components.notes: Zendesk customer support REST API. No MCP server. API token with email/token Basic Auth (agent@domain.com/token:API_TOKEN). OAuth2 for multi-account apps. Subdomain-based URLs require knowing company's Zendesk subdomain. Custom field IDs are numeric and account-specific. Rate limits shared per Zendesk account across all integrations. auth_complexity=75 for unusual Basic Auth format with email prefix.

security_score_components.security_notes: All HTTPS enforced. API token + email Basic Auth is functional. OAuth2 for multi-tenant integrations with granular scopes. SOC2/GDPR/ISO27001/HIPAA/FedRAMP certified — exceptional compliance posture. Webhook SSL validation required. Rate limits per Zendesk account (shared). Enterprise security posture appropriate for customer data handling. Token revocation supported.

reliability_score_components.reliability_notes: SOC2/FedRAMP certified with enterprise SLA. Cursor pagination. Retry guidance documented. Bulk operations use job status polling. Webhook registration requires valid SSL. Rate limits shared across integrations. Custom field IDs are account-specific (requires setup). Partial idempotency. Industry-standard reliability for enterprise support platform.

af_score_components.notes: Zenfeed AI-powered RSS aggregator with MCP. Has MCP quality 70. No built-in authentication (documented security risk for public internet deployment). LLM API keys required (defaults SiliconFlow/Qwen). 8-day data retention only. AGPLv3 license. Default ports 1400 (web) and 1301 (MCP) require separate security. auth_complexity=90 for no auth needed (but risk without reverse proxy).

security_score_components.security_notes: No built-in authentication — developer explicitly documents this as a security concern for public deployment. LLM API keys stored in config. Requires reverse proxy with auth for production use. AGPLv3 license requires source disclosure for network services. Both web (1400) and MCP (1301) ports need securing. Not suitable for public internet exposure without additional security layer. Existing security 40.0 reflects absence of auth.

reliability_score_components.reliability_notes: Self-hosted Go application — reliability is user-managed. 8-day data retention limit restricts historical queries. LLM cost scales with feed volume. Docker deployment provides consistency. No SLA. Active development. Webhook support for notifications. AGPLv3 compliance adds deployment considerations. Suitable for personal RSS curation workflows.

af_score_components.notes: ZeroBounce email validation API. No MCP server. API key as query parameter (security concern but simple). Credits-based billing (each validation consumes credits). Batch validation is async (polling or callback URL). Sub-status codes provide detailed validation results. Catch-all domains cannot be fully validated. auth_complexity=85 for simple API key despite URL exposure.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced but API key in query parameter is a security concern — visible in server logs. Single key per account with broad access. GDPR/SOC2 compliant. No fine-grained scoping. Use server-side proxy to hide API key from client applications. Email validation results contain sensitive data (bounce classification, spam trap detection). secret_handling=60 due to key-in-URL pattern.

reliability_score_components.reliability_notes: SOC2 certified with status page. Full idempotency for validation queries. Batch validation async with polling. Credits consumed even for indeterminate results. No pagination needed (single-result responses). Multi-language SDK maintained. 100 free credits consumed quickly. Reliable for email list validation use cases.

af_score_components.notes: Zillow property data API (Bridge Interactive). No MCP server. Restricted to approved partners only — not available to general developers. OAuth2 via Bridge Interactive platform. Legacy Zillow API deprecated. Documentation scattered across multiple portals. US only. auth_complexity=45 for OAuth2 + partnership requirement reducing agent accessibility.

security_score_components.security_notes: All HTTPS enforced. OAuth2 via Bridge Interactive with partner credentials. Formal partnership agreement required (strong vetting process). Data licensing terms strictly enforced. Zillow Group enterprise security infrastructure. No public access reduces attack surface. SOC-level security for a major public company's data platform.

reliability_score_components.reliability_notes: Zillow enterprise infrastructure. Legacy API deprecation required migration to Bridge Interactive. Full idempotency for queries. Offset pagination. Zestimate accuracy limitations are documented (not precise valuations). US-only data. Documentation scattered makes integration harder. Restricted access means limited community support resources.

af_score_components.notes: Zoom meetings and webinars REST API. No MCP server. Server-to-Server OAuth for agents (JWT deprecated June 2023 — migrate required). OpenAPI spec available. Meeting join URLs expire. Recording download URLs expire after 24 hours (agents must download promptly). Webhook verification required via secret token. Account-level rate limits shared across all apps. auth_complexity=60 for Server-to-Server OAuth flow.

security_score_components.security_notes: All HTTPS enforced. Server-to-Server OAuth (JWT deprecated) provides strong machine-to-machine auth. SOC2/SOC3/GDPR/HIPAA/FedRAMP certified — exceptional compliance posture. Webhook secret token verification. Granular scopes per resource type. JWT deprecation enforces better security practices. Single-use meeting URLs reduce replay risk. Enterprise security infrastructure.

reliability_score_components.reliability_notes: SOC2/FedRAMP certified with enterprise SLA. Account-level rate limits shared across integrations require careful management. Cursor pagination. No idempotency support. Recording URLs expire (24hr). JWT deprecation required migration. OpenAPI spec maintained. Webhook event delivery reliable. Strong platform reliability for enterprise video communication.
